nasb.text: You shall overlay the boards with gold and make their rings of gold as holders for the bars; and you shall overlay the bars with gold.

esv.text: You shall overlay the frames with gold and shall make their rings of gold for holders for the bars, and you shall overlay the bars with gold.

cnv.text: 木板要包金，你也要做板上的金環，用來穿上橫閂，橫閂也要包金。

ccb.text: 所有的木板和横闩都要包上金，并要在木板上造金环，用来穿横闩。
